notes: Iter 13: SIMPLER 2-regime structure. R1 (calm: 0% to 5-15% DD) = TQQQ-heavy. R2 (everything below R1) = CASH/XLU/QQQ mix searched freely. Hypothesis: with no R3, the strategy commits to defensive R2 once any drawdown threshold is breached and stays there until recovery. Should produce fewer rebalances than 3-regime (single down-and-up transition per drawdown event). Wider dd_t1 range [5-15%] explores where the best single threshold lives. drawdown_window can be 1, 2, or 3 years.
